title: Demonstrating Learning from Humans on Open-Source Dexterous Robot Hands
title_zh: 展示从人类学习开源灵巧机器人手
abstract: —Emulating human-like dexterity with robotic hands has been a long-standing challenge in robotics. In recent years, machine learning has demanded robot hands to be reliable, inexpensive and easy-to-reproduce. For the past few years we have been investigating how to address these demands. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6] We will demonstrate our three robot hands that address this problem ranging from rigid easy-to-simulate hand to soft but strong dexterous robot hands performing three different machine learning tasks. Our first machine learning task will be teleoperation, where we will develop a new mobile arm and hand motion capture system that we will bring to RSS 2024. Second, we will demonstrate how to use human-video and human motion to teach robot hands. Finally, we will show how to continually improve these policies using reinforcement learning in both simulation and the real-world
abstract_zh: 模拟人类灵巧性的机器人手一直是机器人学中的长期挑战。近年来，机器学习要求机器人手可靠、廉价且易于复现。过去几年，我们一直在研究如何满足这些需求。[1,2,3,4,5,6] 我们将展示三款解决该问题的机器人手，从易于模拟的刚性手到柔软但强壮的灵巧手，执行三种不同的机器学习任务。第一个任务是遥操作，我们将开发一套新的移动臂和手部运动捕捉系统，并带到 RSS 2024。其次，我们将演示如何利用人类视频和人类运动来教导机器人手。最后，我们将展示如何通过强化学习在仿真和真实世界中持续改进这些策略。
tldr_zh: 展示三款开源灵巧手，通过遥操作、人类视频和强化学习实现学习。
cover_zh: 机器人手也能学人类动作？开源灵巧手现场演示｜RSS 2024
